task: Using only the embedded packet, analyze four records to determine root cause(s) of a cloud cost spike. Fit a simple linear or monotone relationship to the embedded rows (no external data or hidden assumptions). Flag any record whose residual or direction reverses expectations beyond the supplied tolerance (sensitivity_shift_pct) or that is otherwise under-supported as needs_review. Produce an auditable evidence table, record-level citations to packet values, validation checks, sensitivity notes, unresolved assumptions, a final recommendation table, and an owner remediation ticket. Deliverables: cloud_cost_anomaly.xlsx (with formulas/executable logic) and owner_ticket.md. Use the supplied limits, decision_budget_usd, hard_threshold_record_count, and sensitivity_shift_pct when making classifications or recommendations.
